title: named_gap — the FR-3↔FR-4.5↔FR-5 stall interface (C9, Flatline-PRD HC6)
description: What GECKO's diagnose sense emits when a leaf stalls: the missing capability, the evidence, and the bounded recommendation a stall-exit can act on. The stable shape across the sensor (FR-3), the Phase-1 exit (FR-4.5), and the future summon/retune loop (FR-5).
